description: Before filing a motion to compel, attorneys are required to 'meet and confer' to resolve a discovery dispute. An associate needs to prepare for this meeting.

nodes.task_description: Review the discovery requests that are in dispute.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has a clear list of the disputed items.

nodes.task_description: Review the opposing party's objections and responses.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent understands the other side's position.

nodes.task_description: Draft a letter or outline with talking points for the meet and confer, proposing a compromise on the disputed issues.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent prepares a structured plan for the negotiation.
